name: logistics operations managers processing 10-50 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics operations managers processing 10-50 shipments/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed performance insights. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting processes.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track freight performance and generate reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently track freight performance and generate reports.
